name: KUWAZAWA Holdings Corporation
summary: KUWAZAWA Holdings Corporation operates as a construction materials trading company in Japan. It offers basic materials, such as cement, ready-mixed concretes, and concrete piles; civil engineering materials; water supply, agriculture, sewage products, including PVC pipes, RCP pipes, cast iron pipes, valve joints, etc.; guard fences, net fences, railings, and composite fences joints; sealing materials, artificial grasses, and vegetation mats; underdrain drain pipes and various types of poly double pipes and telecommunications pipes; road and park materials; and disaster prevention materials. The company also provides fence construction and roofing materials; steel products, such as deformed bar steel, general shape steel, steel pipe proof, steel sheet pile, steel pipe, sheet pile, tie rod, surface treated steel plate, wire rod, and non-ferrous products; gypsum board, plywood, decorative wall material, laminated wood, and plasterboard products; and siding, die light, and structural insulation board products. In addition, it is involved in the pile and demolition works; and flooring works. Further, the company offers interior fittings housing equipment, and electrification equipment consisting of electric water heaters; eco cute products; oil panel, storage floor, and electric floor heaters; electric boilers; and heat pump heating equipment. The company was formerly known as KUWAZAWA Trading Co.,Ltd. and changed its name to KUWAZAWA Holdings Corporation in September 2020. KUWAZAWA Holdings Corporation was founded in 1933 and is headquartered in Sapporo, Japan.
